summary: Task 9 implementation is complete and correct. All .gitignore entries are present (products/*/product.yaml, products/*/CLAUDE.md, products/*/.claude/, bananzabot/.env). All sensitive files have been untracked via git rm --cached across multiple commits (cbb4e47, 99ad726). Pre-commit security check was improved to exclude deleted files from secret detection (bce0eed), which is a necessary fix to allow untracking secrets without bypassing hooks.

findings.description: The .gitignore entries and most git rm --cached operations were performed by concurrent tasks (task 8 in cbb4e47, task 7 in 99ad726). Task 9 added the pre-commit security fix (bce0eed) and performed the final git rm --cached for remaining tracked files. The end state is correct.

The pre-commit security check fix correctly uses --name-status instead of --name-only and filters out D (deleted) status entries. This allows git rm --cached operations on .env files without needing --no-verify.
